project.name: talos-devmapper-pool
project.summary: Talos system extension for creating a containerd devmapper dm-thin pool at boot and installing the CRI configuration needed by Kata runtime consumers.
goals: Package a Talos system extension that creates the containerd-pool dm-thin pool from the documented node partition.
Install CRI configuration for containerd devmapper and Kata runtime usage through explicit extension files.
Keep reboot, boot ordering, and recovery assumptions visible in this repo's extension source.
nonGoals: Own Talos Linux, containerd, dm-thin, Kata Containers, or host partition provisioning outside this extension.
Own custom Talos image composition, cluster rollout policy, or downstream node upgrade orchestration.
Publish enterprise doctrine, project manifest schema, org rulesets, rollout issue reconciliation, or shared CI and release policy.

owns.name: devmapper-extension-image
owns.description: Dockerfile, Talos manifest, and extension image inputs for the devmapper-pool system extension.

owns.name: devmapper-boot-service
owns.description: Boot-time Talos extension service and init script that create the dm-thin pool and install CRI configuration.

owns.name: devmapper-cri-config
owns.description: Containerd devmapper snapshotter and Kata runtime CRI configuration shipped by this extension.

doesNotOwn: Talos Linux, containerd, dm-thin kernel behavior, Kata Containers internals, or Sidero extension compatibility policy.
Node disk partition creation, cluster upgrade orchestration, or custom Talos image composition.
Enterprise doctrine, project manifest schema, rollout issue reconciliation, org rulesets, or shared workflow implementation.

allowedDependencies.surface: project manifest schema, standards, and rollout audit

forbiddenCouplings: Do not encode one cluster's rollout decision, disk layout policy, or node upgrade schedule as hidden extension behavior.
Do not require consumers to depend on unversioned implementation details beyond the published extension image and documented manifests.
Do not make this repository own custom Talos image composition or downstream infrastructure deployment policy.
Do not publish enterprise process policy from this repository instead of SylphxAI/doctrine.

delivery.deployPath: Main and tag pushes run .github/workflows/build.yml and publish ghcr.io/sylphxai/talos-devmapper-pool images.
delivery.productionProof: Behavior changes require Docker build evidence, GHCR image readback, and Talos boot/runtime evidence showing devmapper pool and CRI configuration behavior on an affected node or rehearsal environment.

gaps.description: Add pull-request and merge-group validation for extension builds before full central admission.
Document the Talos rehearsal or node readback required to prove devmapper pool creation and reboot behavior.
Document image tag, Talos compatibility, and rollback or forward-fix expectations for published extension images.
